title: Villazón Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap has hit Villazón with a Z-Score of -3.40. This event is classified as CRITICAL with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Villazón are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The low temperature has resulted in a high number of heating degree days (HDD) at 12.9 GG, while the cooling degree days (CDD) are at 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 34%, and the wind speed is moderate at 11.8 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
